meaning: n.懒惰者,游手好闲的人,[机]惰轮
examples: This man was no idler - he worked harder than anyone I knew.
He paid his attention all to this thing, as an idler might observe the feat of a juggler, without interest in the outcome.
Bank idler: hope to find my teachers and friends here!
When his head is not in the clouds, the author runs a magazine for dilettantes called the Idler.
The Bad Grammar Awards is hosted by the The Idler Academy.
